{{Quote|Consider it an Imperial attack, you fat fool.|Nima Maas to Temo Dionisio|<ref name="The Hovel on Terk Street">{{Tales|6|The Hovel on Terk Street}}</ref>}}
'''Nima Maas''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the daughter of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Ilov Maas]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agent who pretended to work for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer [[Temo Dionisio]]. She had to kill the Rebel politician, but [[Nok Derrick]] kidnapped the man before she could do her job. Then, she hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] in order to find Dionisio. When Greedo found Dionisio, Nima tried to kill both of them, but the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] managed to kill her by firing a hidden knife into her throat.
